legal_name.description: The legal name of the company

ein.description: The EIN of of the company

tax_payer_type.description: What type of tax entity the company is

filing_form.description:
The form used by the company for federal tax filing. One of:
- 941 (Quarterly federal tax return)
- 944 (Annual federal tax return)

taxable_as_scorp.description: Whether this company should be taxed as an S-Corporation

version.description: The current version of the object. See the [versioning guide](https://docs.gusto.com/embedded-payroll/docs/versioning#object-layer) for information on how to use this field.

body.description: Attributes related to federal tax details that can be updated via this endpoint include:
